reason: Verified that agent QA-20260605-013147-vi7m correctly responds to a math question with the accurate answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent app, sidebar visible with agents listed.
Found and clicked "QA-20260605-013147-vi7m" agent in the sidebar — Agent details page opened, showing the agent configuration with message input field and status indicator.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status showed "idle", which meets the requirement.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was successfully typed into the input field and sent using the Send button.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded almost immediately (within 2 seconds) with the correct answer.
Verified the response mentions "4" — Agent's response was exactly "4", correctly answering the math question.
Took a screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete chat conversation with user message and agent response visible on the screen.
